description: Use this API to set/Get the channel output file type (extended type or not). This API routine was first introduced in release 33.8.0. ierr = set_chnfil_type(status) ierr, status = set_chnfil_type()

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Value of the option setting. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

status.description: channel output file is not of extended type (.out).
channel output file is of extended type (.outx).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
